candidates.why: Primary operating revenue line; matches top-line revenue and equals the revenue component of the total revenue and income subtotal.
Includes revenue plus other income; used as a fallback if the pure revenue line is missing for some years.
Balancing construct rather than a primary reported line; used only as last-resort fallback.

variables.notes: Use the main revenue line first; if missing in some years, fall back to the subtotal then the balancing item.

candidates.why: Best proxy for cost of goods sold / cost of sales among candidates; represents direct production/material costs.
Balance sheet value of raw material inventory, not a period expense; not appropriate for COGS.
Classic SG&A overhead component (personnel-related operating expenses).

candidates.row_label: Stock-Based Compensation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Explicitly part of SG&A; stock-based comp is an overhead component to include.
Bucket of operating overhead expenses; suitable SG&A component when no single SG&A total is fully populated.
Explicit SG&A line, but mostly empty in recent columns; per rules, include it along with broader operating expense buckets to capture earlier years.
Another operating overhead bucket distinct from COGS, depreciation, or impairments; appropriate SG&A component.
Generic share-based compensation line; typically part of SG&A overhead even if preview is empty.

final_choice.row_label: Stock-Based Compensation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses

variables.notes: Explicit SG&A row exists but is sparsely populated, so per instructions it is included along with the main operating overhead buckets.

candidates.why: Primary explicit R&D expense line in the income statement; clearly matches XRD definition.
Likely an alternate/legacy label for the same R&D item; appears currently unpopulated but kept as fallback.
Represents capitalized development costs on the balance sheet, not the period R&D expense; should not be used for XRD.

variables.notes: Use the main income-statement R&D line; the alternate label is provided as a fallback if needed for other years.

candidates.why: Primary interest expense line; best representation of financing cost.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Interest component of lease liabilities; a secondary source of interest expense if the main line is missing or zero.
Capitalized interest reduces expensed interest; included as a lower-priority option in case only net/capitalized interest is reported.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure of lease interest; used as an additional fallback after main interest lines.
Represents outstanding debt principal, not an expense; only a last-resort proxy if no P&L interest is available.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

variables.notes: Later processing should take the first non-missing interest-related line per year, prioritizing the main Interest Expense.

candidates.row_label: Change in fair value equity instruments
candidates.why: Income statement fair value movement, not an equity total; not appropriate for book equity.

candidates.row_label: Net income (loss) attributable to equity holders of the company
candidates.why: Flow measure of profit attributable to equity holders, not the stock of equity; not used for BE.
Component of equity, but appears unpopulated; not the comprehensive equity total.
Single component of equity (e.g., OCI reserves); not total equity.
Represents equity attributable to shareholders but may exclude some components (e.g., non-controlling interests); usable but less comprehensive than total equity lines present.
Explicit total equity line on the balance sheet; matches BE definition directly.
Duplicate labeling of total equity with identical values; also a valid total equity measure.

variables.notes: Use Total Equity as the primary book equity measure; the other equity totals are included as fallbacks if needed for certain periods.
No candidate rows for minority / non-controlling interests were provided; treating MIB as absent/zero.
